name: Oral sodium butyrate overweight and type 2 diabetes trial
summary: Double-blind randomized proof-of-concept trial testing 1875 mg/day oral sodium butyrate for 12 weeks, alongside a hypoenergetic diet, in overweight or obese adults with and without type 2 diabetes.
population: 46 adults aged 30 to 70 years with BMI 25 to 39.9 kg/m2, including 23 with type 2 diabetes

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Microbiome Metabolite Restoration because they can show whether the intervention changes biomarkers and safety in 46 adults aged 30 to 70 years with BMI 25 to 39.9 kg/m2, including 23 with type 2 diabetes. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
